title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - AI Agent & LLM Application Development
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 13 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 90.4%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 92.3%, and average score is 7.88/10. Total training hours are 188 and scaled cost is 9.6. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training course 'AI Agent & LLM Application Development' has been completed with a total of 13 trainees. The overall attendance rate is 90.4%, and the completion rate stands at 100%. The pass rate is 92.3%, with an average score of 7.88 out of 10. Despite these positive metrics, the overall effectiveness classification is marked as Risk, indicating potential areas for improvement.
insights: AI Agent & LLM Application Development has an effectiveness score of 89.47 in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
1 high-priority L&D NORM flag was triggered.
The course achieved a high completion rate and a satisfactory average score, reflecting effective content delivery.
However, the effectiveness classification as Risk suggests that there are underlying issues that need to be addressed, particularly concerning individual trainee performance.
Notably, at least one learner requires additional support, as indicated by the governance flags.
recommendations: Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.
Additionally, consider reviewing course content and delivery methods to address the effectiveness classification.
Regular monitoring of trainee performance and feedback should be implemented to ensure continuous improvement.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.

normFlags.action: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources

supportNeededTrainees.reason: Below pass threshold or attendance below 70%

supportNeededGroups.reason: At least one learner is below pass threshold or attendance policy.
